news.title_en: Solana DeFi TVL Rises 12% This Week
news.summary_zh: DeFiLlama数据显示，Solana生态总锁仓量本周上涨12%，主要受新晋DEX交易量增长推动。
news.summary_en: Solana's total value locked in DeFi rose 12% this week, driven by growing trading volume on new DEXs, according to DeFiLlama.

news.title_zh: Cardano公布2026年Plutus V4升级路线图
news.title_en: Cardano Unveils 2026 Plutus V4 Upgrade Roadmap
news.summary_zh: IOG团队发布Plutus V4路线图，计划2026年Q3上线主网，提升智能合约表达能力并降低手续费。
news.summary_en: IOG released the Plutus V4 technical roadmap, targeting mainnet launch in Q3 2026 with enhanced smart contract expressiveness and lower fees.

news.title_en: Chainlink CCIP Adds Support for 5 Major Blockchains
news.summary_zh: Chainlink跨链互操作协议CCIP宣布新增支持Avalanche、Polygon zkEVM、Base、Arbitrum和Optimism五条主流公链。
news.summary_en: Chainlink Cross-Chain Interoperability Protocol (CCIP) now supports Avalanche, Polygon zkEVM, Base, Arbitrum, and Optimism, expanding its multi-chain connectivity.

news.title_zh: 狗狗币拟引入ZK-Rollup扩容方案
news.title_en: Dogecoin Core Devs Propose ZK-Rollup Layer2 Solution
news.summary_zh: Dogecoin基金会发布草案，探讨基于ZK-Rollup的Layer2方案，旨在降低小额转账手续费。
news.summary_en: Dogecoin Foundation's research group released a draft exploring a ZK-Rollup-based Layer2 scaling solution to reduce transaction fees for micro-payments.
